Title: AI Won't Replace Software Engineers - But It Might Erase The Role
Description: The debate about whether AI will replace software engineers misses the point. The economy will be fine - it always is. The question is whether you will be fine. Entry-level hiring is already down nearly 20%, junior postings have dropped 29%, and the middle layer most engineers have built careers on is contracting. This isn't about macroeconomics. It's about whether the role you've spent a decade mastering will still exist when the dust settles - and whether you'll have the skills for what comes next.
